name: Vanet Gida Sanayi Ic Ve Dis Ticaret Anonim Sirketi
summary: Vanet Gida Sanayi I√É¬ß Ve Dis Ticaret Anonim Sirketi engages in the production and selling of various meat products in Turkey. It offers sausage, salami, fried meat, ham, and dried meat products. The company was founded in 1977 and is based in Istanbul, Turkey.
